name: NJ SNAP (Food Stamps)
description: Monthly food assistance benefits loaded onto an EBT card
eligibility: NJ residents with low income, any immigration status may apply

name: NJ WIC Program
description: Food, nutrition counseling for pregnant women, new mothers, and children under 5
eligibility: Pregnant, postpartum, or breastfeeding women; infants and children under 5 with low income

name: NJ FamilyCare (Medicaid)
description: Free or low cost health insurance for NJ residents
eligibility: NJ residents who meet income limits, includes children, parents, pregnant women

name: LIHEAP (Utility Assistance)
description: Help paying heating and cooling energy bills
eligibility: NJ residents with low income who pay energy bills

name: NJ Rental / Housing Assistance
description: Rental help and eviction-prevention assistance for NJ residents facing hardship

name: NJ Child Care Assistance (CCAP)
description: Subsidized childcare for working low income families
eligibility: Working or in school NJ parents with children under 13 with low income
documents: Proof of employment or school enrollment

name: NJ Legal Services
description: Free civil legal help for low income NJ residents including immigration issues
eligibility: Low income NJ residents needing civil legal assistance

name: NJ Unemployment Insurance
description: Weekly payments if you lost your job through no fault of your own
eligibility: NJ workers who lost jobs involuntarily and meet wage requirements
